results.title: Setting sprays are turning multi-functional in search of staying power
results.description: Beyond fixing make-up, setting sprays are increasingly offering extra benefits to ensure they have staying power with consumers in the hot but competitive category, from scent and colour to SPF and hydration

results.title: Airtel Money IPO puts MTN, Safaricom under fresh pressure to unlock mobile money value
